description: Combine SDFs with smooth blending using polynomial smooth min/max. The blending radius k controls how much shapes melt into each other.

functions.name: opSmoothUnion
functions.definition: Polynomial smooth min with blend radius k
functions.visual: Shapes melt together at proximity k

functions.name: opSmoothIntersection
functions.definition: Polynomial smooth max with blend radius k
functions.visual: Smooth intersection with rounded inner corners

functions.name: opSmoothSubtraction
functions.definition: Smooth max of negated d1 and d2 with blend k
functions.visual: Soft carving with rounded excavation edges

art_failure_modes: Very large k values destroy the identity of individual shapes.
Small k makes blending invisible — looks like hard boolean.
Smooth subtraction with large k can create weird concavities.
